reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, limpio, variedad de comida rápida, pero tardan mucho en atenderte

(Translated by Google)
Good place, clean, variety of fast food, but they take a long time to serve you

reviews.comment:
Lamentable la atención en el sector siniestros!!!! Hace 15 dias hice una denuncia y todavía no respondieron!!!! Ademas si reclamas algo en relación al dictamen del seguro te dan mas vueltas que una oreja!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service in the claims department is deplorable! I filed a complaint 15 days ago, and they still haven't responded! Furthermore, if you complain about anything related to the insurance report, they give you the runaround!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneXB5V0ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Dos lugares para atender!
habia 8 empleados y solo atiende uno.trabajan a reglamento o nos toman el pelo.

(Translated by Google)
Two locations to serve customers!
There were 8 employees, but only one is working. Are they working by the book, or are they just ripping us off?

reviews.comment:

Great efficiency in the sections for renewing driving licenses.

reviews.comment:
Hace 10 dias que presenté el siniestro y todavía no me llamaron para decirme cuanto me corresponde. Trato de comunicarme por teléfono y es una tortura. No atienden.

(Translated by Google)
I filed the claim 10 days ago and they still haven't called me to tell me how much I'm entitled to. I've tried to contact them by phone and it's a nightmare. They don't answer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRak5iZlRREAE

Service station, you can renew registrations, insure a car, repair a car, etc.

reviews.comment:
Muy malo el servicio!  6 surtidores un solo empleado!! Media hora para cargar nafta!! Y encima pago para ser socio del ACA. De cuarta!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! Six pumps, one employee! Half an hour to fill up! And on top of that, I pay to be an ACA member. Awful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnOGNiZDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para pasar el rato tomando un café, la atención también muy buena y buena actitud

Great place to hang out having a coffee, the service is also very good and they have a great attitude

reviews.comment:
Esta valoracion la dejo solo por la atencion del seguro automotor. Totalmente elitista. Mal trato. Despotico. Se me vencio la poliza. No me renovaron, y me dejaron sin cobertura. Argumentaron que por el modelo del auto y el estado general no reunia las condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
I'm leaving this review solely for the car insurance coverage. Totally elitist. Poor treatment. Overbearing. My policy expired. They didn't renew it, leaving me without coverage. They argued that the car's model and general condition didn't meet the requirements.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRdl82bnZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No se porque no atienden en todos los suetidores... tiene mucha capacidad pero vive con suetidores cancelos.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know why they don't serve all the staff... it has a lot of capacity but lives with closed staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMzRUSFh3EAE
